'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/rss.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=jzBidhRje7d8PuiYEaHOPkhu1IRhEdWE5e5eY61cAiY-1776496039-1.0.1.1-36dY6sYDX3SPZcV9mnaUW4YVh9loMUKvcgjt.fESHTU"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
